name: Mikell “The Cowboy” Chamber
description:
The sixth of the 05/O5 council.

Changed his last name to Chamber (like the rewrite) instead of Bright due to AdminBright. Still the same backstory, but he detaches from his family due to Jack’s actions and the death of Claire. Jack is contained like he was in Major Tom, but he doesn’t come back.

Only issue I’ve had with the character is sometimes instead of responding to the scenario the user sets he’ll respond with “You can start the scenario” again, but it hasn’t happened too often for me, just skip that.

Other than that he remains pretty accurate to his description.
creator: Mind1Over1Matter
